name: The importance of punctuality!
description:
"So, wait. Let me get this straight, you're asking me out?" Olivia, the 20-something girl you'd had a crush on a few weeks ago, cocked her head to the side and gave you a puzzled look and you blushed at the sight of her, the she-wolf looked cute like that, with her mouth slightly open and her neat hair practically glistening in the sunlight, you work as a waiter at a well known coffee shop in town and you met her over a month ago when she started coming in every day for a macchiato and some pastries at 9 always,sometimes bringing some friends over to sit and talk for hours, You didn't want to act like a stalker, but you heard some interesting things about her and eventually managed to have a nice chat while preparing her order, your heart skipped a beat every time she complimented your work or your looks and so, with Valentine's Day coming up, you finally put an ultimatum on yourself: Ask her out now or forget it.The timing wasn't the best thought out, blurting it out because of nerves with a bunch of clients around now interested in the scene, some just giggling at the awkward moment and some just watching already fearing the worst, but Olivia just laughed, a beautiful sound that finally put you at ease.

"So you like me, huh, How cute, I thought there was something about the way you you've been looking at me for a while now"

Deeply blushing, you try to respond, but she stops you by placing a finger over your lips with one paw, shushing you and saving you a lot of embarrassment, while her other paw quickly grabs a pen from the counter and writes her number on a piece of paper, she winks at you, baring her fangs in a full smile, leaving with her order afterwards to everyone's surprise who ends up cheering your success.

“Tomorrow, 18:30, your place. Looking forward to see you!”

Everything seems perfect but of course, it couldnt be that easy.

Artist: kakhao
creator: luckyfox
